title: Righteous Family and Leadership
summary: A Quranic dua asking Allah for comfort in family and to make believers an example for the righteous.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
supplications.transliteration: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata a'yunin waj'alna lil-muttaqina imama.
supplications.translation: Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and offspring comfort of eyes, and make us an example for the righteous.
